title: Tomato Zing
description: A zesty one-pot Polish dish featuring sour and crunchy tomatoes in a gluten-free-friendly recipe.

ingredients.name: 3 tablespoons of gluten-free all-purpose flour
ingredients.amount: mixed with water to form a slurry

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add garlic and cook for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Sprinkle flour slurry into the skillet, whisking continuously to avoid lumps.
Increase heat to high and let the mixture bubble for about 1 minute.
Add sliced tomatoes along with their juices. Cook for 5 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper according to taste.
Serve hot as a side dish or over rice.
